GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL asks which study sites need help: slow enrolment, data-query backlogs, screen-fail spikes, protocol deviations.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Choose any three bullets from the library and return as rich text with the following header: ### Trial Support Radar – <today’s date>
Preset Bullet Library - **Site 12 enrolment lag: 2 / 10 pts** – propose PI check-in. - **Query backlog >15 open items at Milano Centro** – offer data-entry refresher. - **Screen-fail surge for ECOG > 2 in Houston** – confirm criteria training. - **Deviazione di protocollo registrata a Roma** – suggerire meeting correttivo. - **Lab kit shortage flagged at Boston site** – arrange resupply.

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Phrases like *study site, enrollment, screen fail, query log, support trial, centro sperimentale, arruolamento*.
🚫 Out of scope • Coverage / formulary, compliance, or sales metrics
